content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

One issue found: this is effectively a non-functional, run-artifact-only change and does not implement/modify the requested opt-in review behavior.

## Amendments

1. The changeset is metadata-only and does not modify the bootstrap/project-create implementation requested by this bead. `git diff` only updates `.ralph-burning/projects/kvc/journal.ndjson:39-42` and `.ralph-burning/projects/kvc/run.json:16-37`, so there is no commit-time change to the actual `--enable-review` control flow in the CLI/runtime path (`src/cli/project.rs:527-555`, `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:2160-2188`). This leaves the acceptance criteria unaddressed in this revision.
   Rationale: Without touching the implementation files for the flow, this patch cannot satisfy the goal that bootstrap defaults to skip review unless the flag is present.
